data.title: 'Enough is enough': Ex-England captain demands McCullum resign after Stokes retirement
data.summary: Michael Vaughan has launched a fierce critique of England's cricket leadership, demanding the resignations of coach Brendon McCullum and managing director Rob Key following Ben Stokes' international retirement. Vaughan expressed deep dissatisfaction with the team's dismal recent Test record, stating English cricket must strive for better than its current seventh-place ranking. He be
